/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g -O0   CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_tty_simulator.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_s.c.o  -o modbus_tty_simulator   -L/home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib  -L/home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/openssl/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/openssl/lib:/workspace/build-docker-opcua-e2e ../libneuron-base.so -pthread -ldl /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libssl.a /home/neuron/main/libs/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lpthread -lm -lprotobuf-c -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
